recommendations.title: Predator: Badlands
recommendations.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

recommendations.title: Mother/Android
recommendations.overview: Georgia and her boyfriend Sam go on a treacherous journey to escape their country, which is caught in an unexpected war with artificial intelligence. Days away from the arrival of their first child, the couple must face No Man’s Land—a stronghold of

recommendations.title: Outside the Wire
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a drone pilot is sent into a deadly militarized zone and must work with an android officer to locate a doomsday device.

recommendations.title: Plankton: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Plankton's tangled love story with his sentient computer wife goes sideways when she takes a stand — and decides to destroy the world without him.

recommendations.title: Hair Love
recommendations.overview: When dad has to unexpectedly step in for mom to do his daughter Zuri’s hair before a big event, what seems like a simple task is anything but as these locks have a mind of their own!
recommendations.director: Bruce W. Smith, Matthew A. Cherry, Everett Downing Jr.

recommendations.title: The Whispering Star
recommendations.overview: A feminine android delivers packages to scattered humans throughout the galaxy. With years to spare, the android and us have time to contemplate the meaning of being human.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: Generations
recommendations.overview: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-D find themselves at odds with the renegade scientist Soran who is destroying entire star systems. Only one man can help Picard stop Soran's scheme...and he's been dead for seventy-eight years.

recommendations.title: Transamerica
recommendations.overview: A transgender woman takes an unexpected journey when she learns that she had a son, now a teenage runaway hustling on the streets of New York.
